capabilities.notes: Systolic MMU path in place; verification depth still improving.
Vector unit supports add, relu, max, mul in current model.
Descriptor-driven execution and operation-class routing are active.
Conv unit integrated in top-level operation path; 3D extension pending.
Depthwise mode handled in conv unit with op-class control.
Approximate sigmoid/tanh paths enabled through vector op modes.
Pooling unit supports max/avg/global(max) style behavior.
Norm unit provides affine-normalization style path.
Add/mul/scale/clip/compare are wired in vector unit.
Reduction unit supports all listed modes in current form.
Runtime/config-level reshape/transpose/concat descriptors are active in flow validation.
Blockwise QKV/scaled-dot path is routed through op-class flow and benchmark instrumentation.
Math unit provides approximations for exp/log/sqrt.
Precision conversion unit supports clipping/scaling and int conversion paths.
Fixed-point style arithmetic is used across datapath modules.
Mixed precision execution path is enabled via precision conversion and op scheduling controls.
